# Vendored libraries

Self-hosted, build-step-free. Update by re-running the curl commands in the
cinematic-rework plan with a new pinned version, then bump the version here.

| File | Package | Version | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| gsap.min.js | gsap | 3.12.5 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js |
| ScrollTrigger.min.js | gsap/ScrollTrigger | 3.12.5 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js |
| lenis.mjs | lenis | 1.3.25 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lenis@1.3.25/dist/lenis.mjs |
